creator_message: Can we have both fix price and sharing revenue? For example 2000 USD + sharing revenue model. Actually I work with a lot of creators under my management, so I can recommend suitable creators for this campaign.
business_context: User says hybrid model is not currently supported. Manager may become a useful long-term partner with more creators.
best_reply: Hi! 😊 Thank you so much for your patience, and I really appreciate your follow-up! I also really appreciate you mentioning that you work with many creators. That’s actually something we’re very interested in. We always hope to build long-term relationships with trusted partners, so if our first collaboration goes well, we’d be more than happy to explore opportunities with other creators you represent in the future. Regarding your suggestion of a hybrid model (Fixed Fee + Revenue Share), I completely understand why that structure would be attractive. However, at the moment, our project follows a standardized collaboration model, so we’re only able to offer either a Fixed Project Fee or a Revenue Share model, rather than a combination of both. Personally, I would still recommend the Revenue Share model. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by the project, and based on our experience, most of the creators we’ve recently partnered with have chosen this option because of its much stronger long-term earning potential. Our platform is also responsible for the global distribution and promotion of the AI short drama, so it’s a joint effort to maximize the success of each project. If our first collaboration is successful, I’d definitely be happy to discuss expanding our cooperation with the creators you manage. I believe building a long-term partnership would be valuable for both of us. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts! 😊
chinese_translation: 礼貌拒绝固定费+分成混合模式，说明当前只能二选一，同时保留和经纪人旗下其他创作者长期合作的可能。
why_this_reply: 对方是经纪人且手里有多名达人，不能只按单个达人谈判处理。先维护关系，再拒绝混合模式，最后推 Revenue Share。
next_step: 让对方选择 Fixed Fee 或 Revenue Share；如果对分成有兴趣，发送 Revenue Share 合同草案。
risk_notes: 不要承诺未来一定开放混合结构，只说未来可探索更多合作机会。

creator_message: Does the contract restrict me from doing other AI-related projects?
business_context: User says current contract term has been changed to one year and wants to clarify this is project-specific, not a full AI exclusivity.
best_reply: One more thing I’d also like to mention regarding the agreement. Based on feedback from creators, we’ve already updated the agreement, and the contract term has now been adjusted to one year. I’d also like to clarify that this is not an exclusive partnership covering all AI-related collaborations. Our agreement is project-specific, meaning it only protects the specific AI character, storyline, and identity created for this project. In other words, you’re absolutely free to work on other AI-related projects or collaborate with other companies during the contract term. The exclusivity only applies to creating or licensing a highly similar AI character or role that would directly compete with this specific project. We want to make sure both parties feel comfortable while also protecting the uniqueness and commercial value of the project itself.
chinese_translation: 合同期限已调整为一年；并非所有 AI 合作独家，只是保护本项目高度相似的人设、角色和故事。
why_this_reply: 解决对方对 exclusivity 的误解，避免对方以为一年内不能做任何 AI 项目。
next_step: 让对方继续审核合同；如无问题推进签署。
risk_notes: 只有在用户确认合同已改为一年时才使用 one-year 口径。

creator_message: Here are their rates: $13,000 TikTok, $13,000 Instagram. Please let us know if these rates work and share deliverables.
business_context: User can offer USD 6,000 fixed fee, but wants to focus on Revenue Share and estimate gross revenue potential around USD 200,000 if project performs well.
best_reply: Hi Benita, Thank you so much for your reply, and it’s great to meet you! We really appreciate you sharing William’s rate card, and after reviewing his profile, we can absolutely understand the value of his audience and content. Our collaboration is a little different from a traditional brand campaign. This is an AI Short Drama project where William would become the lead character in an original AI-generated mini-series created around his personal brand and content style. A complete project typically includes an AI short drama with approximately 10–20 episodes. Around the first one-third of the series is released as free episodes to attract viewers, while the remaining episodes are unlocked on our platform through a one-time purchase. During the launch period, creators typically publish around five promotional posts, including free episodes, trailers, highlight clips, or other mutually agreed promotional content. After discussing internally with our team, the highest Fixed Project Fee we can currently offer is USD 6,000 for the entire project. That said, after reviewing William’s account, I genuinely believe the Revenue Share model would be a much better fit. Under this model, creators receive 80% of the Net Revenue generated by the project. Based on William’s audience size and engagement, we believe the project has the potential to generate approximately USD 200,000 in gross revenue if it performs well. While actual performance will always depend on factors such as the story, audience engagement, and overall promotion, we believe the long-term earning potential is significantly higher than a one-time fixed payment. In addition, this isn’t a campaign that relies solely on William’s own promotion. Our platform will also handle the global distribution and promotion of the series, meaning we’re fully aligned in making the project as successful as possible. If this sounds interesting, I’d be happy to send over our Revenue Share agreement so you can review the collaboration structure in more detail.
chinese_translation: 认可经纪人报价，说明项目不是传统广告；固费最高6000美元，但更推荐80%收益分成，并用20万美元潜在总收入做非保证性估算。
why_this_reply: 对大V经纪人需要专业，不宜直接拒绝；先认可价值，再说明项目差异和预算上限，最后推分成。
next_step: 发送 Revenue Share 合同或确认是否接受 Fixed Fee。
risk_notes: 收益预估必须说 potential / if performs well / not guaranteed。

creator_message: When would I receive the fixed fee payment?
business_context: Explain fixed project fee signing process and two installments.
best_reply: Hi! I’d be happy to explain the process. If you choose the Fixed Project Fee model, we’ll first send you an electronic agreement for your review and signature. Once both parties have signed the agreement, the project will officially move into the content development and production stage. The first payment will be made within 10 business days after the agreement has been signed and the project officially enters production. The remaining payment will be made after the AI short drama has been completed and officially released. By the way, could you please confirm whether the email address we’ve been using to contact you is the best one to receive the agreement? If so, we’ll send the electronic contract to that email, and once it’s signed, we can officially begin the collaboration.
chinese_translation: 固定付费先签电子合同，签署并进入制作后10个工作日内付第一笔，发行后付剩余款；同时确认邮箱。
why_this_reply: 同时回答付款时间和推进签约流程。
next_step: 确认邮箱，发送电子签合同。
risk_notes: 不要说 production 前预付款。

creator_message: Could you please provide a detailed definition of Net Revenue, including any fees, costs, or deductions before the 80/20 split?
business_context: Use contract transparency language: dashboard and detailed report request within two months.
best_reply: Hi, Thank you for your question. According to the agreement, Net Revenue refers to the revenue generated by the project after deducting reasonable and necessary costs directly related to its operation and distribution. These may include third-party platform service fees or payment processing fees, taxes or mandatory governmental charges, refunds or chargebacks if applicable, and other reasonable operational expenses directly related to the distribution and monetization of the project. To ensure transparency, we will also register an account for you on our platform, where you’ll have access to your project dashboard and be able to view subscription orders and revenue data. In addition, as stated in the agreement, within two months after receiving each revenue statement, you may submit a written request for a more detailed revenue report, and we will provide the corresponding revenue details in accordance with the agreement.
chinese_translation: 解释 Net Revenue 扣除项、后台数据看板、收到结算单后两个月内可书面申请详细收益报告。
why_this_reply: 按合同口径解决透明度问题，避免过度承诺审计权。
next_step: 继续合同审核，如有其他问题继续回复。
risk_notes: 不要承诺第三方审计，除非合同允许。

creator_message: Korean creator provides a long story idea about a mute legendary ninja who can only talk to sheep, with action/mystery/revenge/fantasy/healing elements.
business_context: User needs to summarize creator idea in Chinese for content team to write outline.
best_reply: 内容团队参考：题材为动作、悬疑、复仇、奇幻、治愈。核心设定是失忆失语的传奇忍者男主，曾是秘密忍者学校最强杀手，被组织背叛后因神秘人体强化药物复活，失去记忆和语言能力，只能与羊交流。羊在现实中是普通羊，但在男主幻觉中像一支拥有不同身份的小队，承担陪伴、吐槽、建议和治愈功能。主线围绕男主恢复记忆、揭开制药公司药物阴谋、营救女主 Avery 并向忍者组织复仇展开。女主父母曾是药物研究员，掌握核心资料后被灭口，男主过去曾放过年幼的女主一命。第一集核心爆点是平静生活被组织袭击，女主被绑架，收养男主的老夫妇死亡，男主在羊的引导下重新战斗，戴着耳机以音乐节奏完成极简精准的暗杀。重点保留两个记忆点：只能和羊交流的失忆忍者，以及听着音乐像跳舞一样完成暗杀的战斗风格。
why_this_reply: 把长创意压缩为内容团队能使用的世界观、人设、主线、第一集爆点、核心记忆点。
risk_notes: 不要把原文全部丢给内容团队；要保留核心创意并简化关系。
